content:
IVX IA FINAL ENTERPRISE CERTIFICATION – BLOCK 1 (NO NARRATIVE)

Objective:
Complete IVX Enterprise Data Protection certification and provide live proof. Do not describe a plan. Execute, verify, and return evidence only.

1. GitHub → Render
- Verify latest GitHub SHA equals latest Render SHA.
- Wait until Render finishes deployment.
- Verify /health returns latest commit.
- Verify every new recovery endpoint is deployed.
- Return:
  - GitHub SHA
  - Render Deploy ID
  - Render SHA
  - /health response

2. Supabase Enterprise Backup
- Verify Point-In-Time Recovery (PITR).
- Verify backup retention.
- Verify daily backup schedule.
- Verify WAL archiving.
- Verify restore window.
- Return screenshots or API evidence if available.

3. Storage Protection
- Verify S3 bucket versioning.
- Verify object lock/immutability if configured.
- Verify lifecycle rules.
- Verify encryption.
- Verify cross-region or secondary backup if configured.
- Return bucket verification evidence.

4. Restore Drill
Perform a complete non-destructive recovery test.

Create:
- test_member
- test_investor
- test_transaction
- test_jv_deal

Create snapshot.

Delete test records.

Restore snapshot.

Verify:
- IDs preserved
- Relationships preserved
- Wallet balances identical
- Transactions identical
- Analytics identical
- Messages identical

Return before/after counts.

5. Financial Integrity
Verify:

members
investors
buyers
realtors
brokers
tokenized
wallets
ledger
treasury
transactions
withdrawals
fees
analytics

Run reconciliation.

Return:

PASS/FAIL

6. Owner Recovery Center
Verify Android
Verify iOS
Verify Web

Owner can:

View backups
Create snapshot
Restore snapshot
View reports
View PITR status
View storage health
View recovery history

Return screenshots.

7. Monitoring
Verify:

Daily report scheduler
Recovery alerts
Recovery logs
Failure alerts
Health monitor

Return last execution time.

8. Final Certification

Return ONLY:

CERTIFIED:
YES / NO

Completion %

Remaining blockers

Exact files changed

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Supabase Project

Recovery APIs verified

Recovery drill PASS/FAIL

Financial reconciliation PASS/FAIL

Data integrity PASS/FAIL

RPO

RTO

Evidence links

Do not ask for credentials unless an actual runtime 401/403 or missing secret is proven with logs. All previously stored variables must be reused automatically.
